overall.description: First-person horseback riding through a medieval village in a video game (likely Kingdom Come: Deliverance). The player rides along dirt paths past thatched-roof houses, wooden carts, and a stream, with smoke rising from village chimneys under a bright blue sky.

events.description: passing a wooden cart on the left side of the road
crossing a small wooden bridge over a stream bed

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot along a dirt path toward the village center

entered.detail: cluster of medieval village houses with straw roofs and wooden frames
empty wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the roadside
stacks of cut timber logs arranged along the right side of the path
simple wooden plank bridge crossing a small drainage ditch

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from horseback approaching a medieval village on a wide dirt road. The rider passes a wooden cart on the left and crosses a small wooden bridge, with thatched-roof houses visible ahead and log piles stacked on the right. The environment is open and sunlit with grassy fields flanking the road.

events.description: horse turns right at a fork in the road toward a stream
riding alongside a flowing stream with eroded dirt banks

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse to turn right at a junction and ride alongside a village stream

entered.detail: narrow waterway with eroded dirt banks and flowing water
low stone retaining wall along the stream edge

segments.scene_description: The horse turns right at a fork, entering a narrower village street that runs alongside a stream. The rider passes close to the water's edge, with stone walls and thatched houses now flanking the path. The wooden cart and bridge from the approach are left behind as the scene becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with barns and stables

events.description: turning left away from the stream toward a large wooden barn
passing two horses tied to a stone wall on the right

agents.ego_description: turning left at a junction and riding past a large barn and other tethered horses

notable_agents.action: two horses standing tethered to a stone wall, one eating from a trough

entered.detail: large open-sided wooden structure with a sloped shingle roof used for storage
whitewashed stone wall of a village building with small windows
covered wagons with canvas tops parked near the barn

segments.scene_description: The rider turns left away from the stream, entering a village square dominated by a large wooden barn on the left. The horse passes two tethered horses standing by a stone building on the right, then continues past parked wooden carts. The environment shows signs of active village life with agricultural structures.

events.description: approaching a pedestrian walking in the middle of the dirt road

agents.ego_description: riding forward through the village street approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: villager walking toward the camera in the middle of the dirt road

entered.detail: villager in medieval clothing walking along the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider proceeding down a village street lined with thatched-roof houses on both sides. A pedestrian appears walking toward the camera in the road ahead. The large barn and stone building from the previous segment fall behind as the rider continues through the village center, passing more wooden carts and traditional medieval architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on horseback from an open rural approach into the heart of a bustling medieval village. It begins on a wide, sunlit dirt road, passing a wooden cart and crossing a small bridge flanked by grassy fields and stacked logs. As the horse turns right at a fork, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting to a narrow street that runs closely alongside a flowing stream and stone walls. The scene then opens into a village square, moving past a large wooden barn and tethered horses before turning left away from the water. Finally, the camera proceeds down a central village street lined with thatched-roof houses and parked carts, heading toward a pedestrian walking in the road.
